title: Update README and ELI5 to reflect v0.5.0 documentation

comments.author: maxine--basel
comments.content: Updating README features section and ELI5 to match the v0.5.0 quarto docs — adding design workflow, kickoff improvements, section-based knowledge editing, and reorganizing the documentation links to match the new site structure

comments.author: maxine--basel
comments.content: Updated README: added Design Document Workflow section, expanded kickoff with verification levels and management commands, added section-based editing to knowledge, reorganized docs links into Getting Started / Guides / Reference groups. Updated ELI5: added multi-agent and design-to-build sections, expanded why-should-I-care list.

comments.author: maxine--basel
